title: Stop Watching Tutorials - Build These 4 Claude Projects to 10x Output
summary: Austin Marchese advocates building four practical Claude projects to improve productivity: an AI Board of Advisors, a niche Command Center, an AI-optimized personal website, and an Internal Operating System. The core position is that project-based learning delivers greater value than watching tutorials.
